site.title: Xavion Dean - Software Developer
site.description: I'm a software developer based in Edmonton, passionate about user experience and specializing in engaging animations and micro-interactions. My primary tools of choice include: JavaScript, React, Solid.js, Astro, Svelte, and Node.js.

intro.name: Xavion Dean
intro.summary: a software developer with strong focus on the user experience, animations and micro interactions

supportLink.imageAlt: Buy Me a Coffee at ko-fi.com

about.title: About me
about.intro: Hi, I'm Xavion, a software developer based in Edmonton, Canada.
about.toolsIntro: My primary tools of choice includes:
about.passion: Beyond coding, I'm passionate about design, user experience, animations and micro-interactions.
about.approach: While I have some preferred tools, I always choose the best one for the job, even if it's not on my usual list. My goal is to find the right solution for each project.
